ptolemaic.keyEarthInfo: Earth. In Ptolemy's model Earth is stationary at the center.
ptolemaic.keyPlanetInfo: The planet, which in this model orbits Earth using a circle-on-circle construction. The large circle is the deferent and the small one is the epicycle.
ptolemaic.keySunInfo: The sun. Note that this icon indicates the sun's direction with respect to Earth, not its absolute position in space.
ptolemaic.keyDeferentCenterInfo: The center of the deferent (the larger circle on which the epicycle moves).
ptolemaic.keyEquantInfo: The equant, which is the center of uniform motion of the epicycle around the deferent.

screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows the Ptolemaic, Earth-centered model: a planet on an epicycle whose center rides a deferent around the Earth, alongside the resulting view from Earth.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has controls for the planet and the sizes and rates of its deferent and epicycle, plus a Reset All button that returns the screen to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Adjust the deferent and epicycle to see how the planet appears to move as seen from Earth.

ptolemaic.currentDetailsTemplate: Planet preset: {{preset}}. The animation is {{playState}}, running at {{rate}} days per second.

screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows the Sun-centered solar system with the Earth and another planet, and the configuration, such as opposition or conjunction, that they form.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has controls for choosing a planet and its orbit and for animating the orbits, plus a Reset All button that returns the screen to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Choose a planet and animate the orbits to see the planetary configurations form.

configurations.currentDetailsTemplate: Observer's planet: {{observer}}. Target planet: {{target}}. Current time: {{time}} years. {{configuration}}

controls.observerDrag: Observer's planet — drag to set time
controls.targetDrag: Target planet — drag to set time
controls.observerShiftDrag: Observer's planet — Shift-drag to set epoch angle
controls.targetShiftDrag: Target planet — Shift-drag to set epoch angle
controls.timelineEvent: Timeline event — activate to slew to this event
